ADMISSION PROCESS & FEE DETAILS FOR 1* Year B. E: 2025-2026
> Download the KEA Confirmation Slip from your KEA student login, take a printout, and report to the Main
Library (Building No. 2) to complete biometric attendance and collect your Admission Order copy.
> All original documents must be scanned separately in colour using a document scanner (not a mobile phone)
and saved in JPG/JPEG format, each file within MB. Keep the scanned copies ready on your mobile device or
pen drive for uploading through the student login. A passport-size colour photograph (soft copy) must also
be uploaded and should be within 500 KB in size.
Do not use a mobile phone to scan documents or photos.
> Submit the allotment letter along with the application number (obtained from Step 2) at the Fee Section,
Building No. 1, 2nd Floor, Room No. 206.
> Fees can be paid via Debit Card, UPI, or NEFT/R
TGS. After payment, collect the fee challan.
> Print the application by providing the fee payment challan (refer to your application number obtained in Step 2).
> Submit all the necessary original documents and obtain the acknowledgement at Building No. 2 — Main
